description_long: This is a full-size gaming keyboard with a striking black and red color scheme, featuring angular, aggressive contours and a robust plastic chassis. The keyboard includes a standard QWERTY layout with a dedicated numeric keypad, function keys, and additional media or macro keys above the main key cluster. The keycaps are slightly raised and appear to be made of durable plastic, with red backlighting visible between the keys and on accent panels. The keyboard is wired, with a braided USB cable extending from the top center, suggesting a focus on performance and reliability. Red accent panels and textured grips are present on the sides and wrist rest area, enhancing both aesthetics and ergonomics. The overall design is modern and tailored for gaming or high-performance computing environments.
description: A black and red full-size gaming keyboard with angular contours, red backlighting, and a braided USB cable. Features include a numeric keypad, raised keycaps, and textured side accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, wrist rest, and red accent panels.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the raised keycaps, textured side grips, and visible USB cable.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge, cable exit point, and the overall width of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the side accents, key profile, and cable orientation.
